methods.double factorial(int n): Returns n!, that is, the product of the first n positive integers, 1 if n == 0, or n!, or Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY if n! > Double.MAX_VALUE.
methods.int fuzzyCompare(double a, double b, dou: Compares a and b "fuzzily, " with a tolerance for nearly-equal values.
methods.boolean fuzzyEquals(double a, double b,: Returns true if a and b are within tolerance of each other.
methods.boolean isMathematicalInteger(double x): Returns true if x represents a mathematical integer.
methods.boolean isPowerOfTwo(double x): Returns true if x is exactly equal to 2^k for some finite integer k.
methods.double log2(double x): Returns the base 2 logarithm of a double value.
methods.int log2(double x, RoundingMode mode): Returns the base 2 logarithm of a double value, rounded with the specified rounding mode to an int.
methods.double mean(double... values): Returns the arithmetic mean of values.
methods.double mean(int... values): Returns the arithmetic mean of values.
methods.double mean(Iterable values): Returns the arithmetic mean of values.
methods.double mean(Iterator values): Returns the arithmetic mean of values.
methods.double mean(long... values): Returns the arithmetic mean of values.
methods.BigInteger roundToBigInteger(double x, R: Returns the BigInteger value that is equal to x rounded with the specified rounding mode, if possible.
methods.int roundToInt(double x, RoundingMode mo: Returns the int value that is equal to x rounded with the specified rounding mode, if possible.
methods.long roundToLong(double x, RoundingMode: Returns the long value that is equal to x rounded with the specified rounding mode, if possible.
